[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010101 5
1 011111110 7
2 111101001 6
3 000000000 a
4 001001101 4
5 001011101 5
6 000000010 1
